ptxt.intxrefpoff: Direct Clutch Assembly Disassembly and Reassembly

servinfosub.title: Clutch Disc, Separator Plate and Retaining Plate
servinfosub.ptxt: Check that sliding surfaces of clutch discs, separator plates and retaining plate are not worn hard or burnt.

attention3.ptxt: If disc lining is exfoliated or discolored, replace all discs.

servinfosub.title: Direct Clutch Return Spring Subassembly
servinfosub.ptxt: Measure free length of direct clutch return spring.
If measured length is out of reference value greatly, replace direct clutch assembly.

item.ptxt: Do not apply excessive force when measuring spring free length.

spec.title: Reference free length of direct clutch return spring

servinfosub.title: Direct Clutch Piston
servinfosub.ptxt: Shake direct clutch piston lightly and check that check ball (1) is not stuck.
Blow in low pressure air (Max. 100 kPa, 1.0 kgf/cm2, 14.5 psi) to check ball to check that there is no leakage.
